name: Large Ladies (RPG) (Vore)
description:
Inspired by a bot I saw on spicy chat of the same name and story behind it but I’m polishing it and attempting to make it on janitor ai instead. I decided I wanted to start making bots for myself but also others. So I got inspired.

When testing, I tested it decently mostly on Pred pov since that is what I mostly do but being a prey boy might not work as well… I’m not sure since I don’t really test that much…

Sorry if it’s not the best since I’m still working this stuff out since this is only my second bot I’m making using advice from my first bot…

Of course if you want me to try making a bot from you then I’m happy to take suggestions! Though I mostly do Pred pov since it’s my personal preference, I’m perfectly fine doing prey pov bots or simply rpg based bots or anything… just give me ideas… at most I won’t do ntr and certain things of a similar basis. Not hate but just personal preference.

With this bot it is done with the idea in mind that if your a boy then your prey and if your a girl your a Pred so sorry if you want to do it the opposite way or something but it’s simply the lore for the universe.
creator: Naomi7
